zh.lifeSummary: 當Goda de Toni於1142年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾艾吉頓時，她的父親Roger de Tosny III38歲，母親Gertrude de Hainault33歲。她於1160年與William de Mohun在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1228年2月5日在英國英格蘭享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Goda de Toni于1142年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾艾吉頓时，她的父亲Roger de Tosny III38岁，母亲Gertrude de Hainault33岁。她于1160年与William de Mohun在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1228年2月5日在英国英格兰享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Toni
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Alberto, Aldo, Alessandro, Anselmo, Beto, Eugenio, Italo, Luigi, Sergio, Silva.
Italian: from a short form of the personal name Antonio (see Anthony ).

variants.name: Anthony
meanings: English and West Indian (mainly Antigua and Barbuda, Saint Lucia, and Trinidad and Tobago, also Dutch Caribbean): from the personal name Anthony, Latin Antonius, which, with its variants and cognates, is one of the commonest personal names in Europe. Spellings with -h-, which first appear in English in the 16th century and in French (as Anthoine) at about the same time, are due to the erroneous belief that the name derives from Greek anthos ‘flower’. The popularity of the personal name in Christendom is largely due to the cult of the Egyptian hermit Saint Anthony ( AD 251–356), who in his old age gathered a community of hermits around him, and for that reason is regarded by some as the founder of monasticism. It was further increased by the fame of Saint Anthony of Padua (1195–1231), who long enjoyed a great popular cult and who is believed to help people find lost things. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates and derivatives (patronymics) from other languages, for example Greek patronymic Antoniades , Italian Antoni , Polish Antoniewicz , Croatian and Serbian Antonović (see Antonovich ) and Antunović; see also below. The name Anthony is also found among Christians in southern India, but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Antony .

German, Flemish, and French (mainly Alsace): Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from local equivalents of the Latin personal name Antonius, from its genitive form Antoni(i). In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the German, Dutch, French, and Slovak cognates Antoni 1 and Antony 2.
History: John Anthony of Hampstead, Middlesex, England (now part of north London) migrated to Boston, MA, in 1634. By 1640 he had moved to Providence, RI, where his descendants are still established.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Goda de Toni was born in 1142, in Egginton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger de Tosny III, was 38 and her mother, Gertrude de Hainault, was 33. She married William de Mohun in 1160, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 5 February 1228, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Goda de Toni est née en 1142, à Egginton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Tosny III, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Gertrude de Hainault, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé William de Mohun en 1160, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 5 février 1228, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Goda de Toni 1142 in Egginton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Tosny III 38 und ihre Mutter Gertrude de Hainault 33. Sie hat 1160 in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom William de Mohun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 5. Februar 1228 im Alter von 86 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Goda de Toni è nata il nel 1142 nel Egginton, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger de Tosny III, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Gertrude de Hainault, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato William de Mohun nel 1160, nel Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 5 febbraio 1228, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Goda de Toniが1142年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアエグジントンで生まれた時，父Roger de Tosny IIIは38歳，母Gertrude de Hainaultは33歳であった。1160年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターでWilliam de Mohunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1228年2月5日にイギリスイギリスで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Goda de Toni(이)가 1142년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 긴턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Tosny III(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrude de Hainault(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 William de Mohun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1228년 2월 5일 영국 잉글랜드에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Goda de Toni nasceu em 1142, em Egginton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger de Tosny III, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude de Hainault, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Mohun em 1160, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1228, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Goda de Toni родилась в 1142 г. в местности эгинтон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger de Tosny III было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude de Hainault, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Mohun в 1160 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 5 февраля 1228 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Goda de Toni nació en 1142, en Egginton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger de Tosny III, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Gertrude de Hainault, tenía 33 años. Se casó con William de Mohun en 1160, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 5 de febrero de 1228, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años.
